mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart(user_id, sku_id, quantity, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = CASE WHEN deleted = 1 THEN VALUES(quantity) ELSE quantity + VALUES(quantity) END, update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE cart SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
